Reviews About Contact

Contact Us

Have questions, suggestions, or product review requests? We'd love to hear from you!

Get in Touch

  • Email: hello@petfoodlab.it.com
  • Response Time: 24-48 hours

Product Review Requests

Want us to review a specific product? Send us:

  • Product name and brand
  • Where to buy it
  • Why you think it's worth reviewing

Advertising & Partnerships

For advertising inquiries, contact ads@petfoodlab.it.com

Note: We maintain editorial independence. Advertising does not influence our reviews.
